headline: Why Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Is Up 6.8% After $2 Billion Push Into Polymarket Data Integration
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) recently completed its US$2.00 billion multi-stage investment in Polymarket, including a US$600.00 million cash injection and plans to buy up to US$40.00 million of existing securities, while also advancing regulatory-focused bylaw amendments and digital-asset initiatives such as NYSE’s tokenized securities partnership with Securitize. By securing exclusive global rights to distribute Polymarket’s event-driven data, ICE is moving to embed real-time...
